name: Tortilla Roll-Ups
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons chopped black olives, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, blend the cream cheese, sour cream, green onions, chilies, olives, and cheddar cheese until well combined.
2. Spread the mixture evenly on the tortillas. Roll up tightly.
3. Wrap the rolled tortillas in damp paper towels and place them in resealable plastic bags.
4. Chill for 15 minutes.
5. To serve, cut into 1-inch pieces.
Makes 12 servings. Preparation time: 10 minutes. Chilling time: 15 minutes. Per serving: Approximately 216 calories, 11 grams protein, 34 grams carbohydrates, 4 grams fat, 17% of calories from fat, 4 milligrams cholesterol, 654 milligrams sodium, and 5 grams fiber.
